meta.title: Run Faster
meta.description: Advanced character options for Shadowrun 5th Edition, including new metatypes, qualities, creation methods, lifestyles, contacts, and more.

positive.name: Adrenaline Surge
positive.summary: Act first in the first Initiative Pass of combat, before anyone rolls Initiative.

effects.description: Act first in the first Initiative Pass, before Initiative is rolled.

positive.name: Animal Empathy
positive.summary: +2 dice to animal influence/control tests.

effects.description: +2 dice to Animal Handling tests.

positive.name: Black Market Pipeline
positive.summary: 10% price reduction and +2 Availability for one contact or gear category.

positive.name: Born Rich
positive.summary: Trade up to 40 Karma for nuyen at character creation instead of the normal 10.

positive.name: City Slicker
positive.summary: +1 Outdoors in urban environments, -1 Perception/Survival in non-urban.

effects.description: +1 die to Outdoors skill tests in urban environments.
-1 die to Perception and Survival tests outside urban areas.

positive.name: College Education
positive.summary: Half-price Academic Knowledge skills at character creation.

positive.name: Common Sense
positive.summary: GM warns the player when the character is about to do something obviously foolish (once per session via Edge).

positive.name: Daredevil
positive.summary: Regain 2 Edge instead of 1 for daring actions.

positive.name: Digital Doppelganger
positive.summary: +2 threshold for Matrix tracking on your linked SIN.

effects.description: +2 to the threshold for Matrix searches targeting your SIN.

positive.name: Disgraced
positive.summary: +2 Intimidate against criminals; penalty with upright citizens.

effects.description: +2 dice to Intimidation tests against criminals.

positive.name: Erased
positive.summary: No Matrix search results; Public Awareness maximum 1.

effects.description: No Matrix search results exist for this character.
Public Awareness cannot exceed 1.

positive.name: Fame
positive.summary: Character is publicly known; social bonuses scaling with fame level.

1.name: Local Fame
1.description: Well-known in a single neighborhood or small community.

2.name: Regional Fame
2.description: Known throughout a city or sprawl.

3.name: National Fame
3.description: Famous across a country or major region.

positive.name: Friends in High Places
positive.summary: Extra CHA x 4 Karma for contacts with Connection 8+.

positive.name: Hawk Eye
positive.summary: +1 Perception; range modifiers shift up one category.

effects.description: +1 die to visual Perception tests.

positive.name: Inspired
positive.summary: +2 Street Cred among artists; +1 Artisan or Performance.

effects.description: +1 die to Artisan or Performance tests.

positive.name: Jack of All Trades
positive.summary: -1 Karma cost for skills up to rating 5; +2 Karma cost beyond rating 5.

positive.name: Lightning Reflexes
positive.summary: +1 Initiative rating, +1 Initiative die, +1 Defense (unaugmented only).

prerequisite.description: Cannot have any Reaction or Initiative augmentations (cyberware, bioware, adept powers, etc.)

effects.description: +1 to Reaction attribute.
+1d6 to Initiative.

positive.name: Linguist
positive.summary: Half language learning time; 2-for-1 language skills at character creation.

positive.name: Made Man
positive.summary: Free syndicate group contact; fence services at 30%.

positive.name: Night Vision
positive.summary: Low-light vision with sun glare penalty.

effects.description: Natural low-light vision; no penalties in dim light conditions.
-1 die penalty in bright sunlight or glare conditions.

positive.name: Outdoorsman
positive.summary: +2 Outdoors in rural environments; -1 Perception/Survival in urban.

effects.description: +2 dice to Outdoors skill tests in rural/wilderness environments.
-1 die to Perception and Survival tests in urban areas.

positive.name: Overclocker
positive.summary: +1 Rating to one cyberdeck ASDF attribute.

effects.description: +1 to the chosen cyberdeck ASDF attribute rating.

positive.name: Perceptive
positive.summary: +1/+2 dice to all Perception tests.

effects.description: +1 die per rating to Perception tests.

positive.name: Perfect Time
positive.summary: Always knows the exact time; +1 Free Action per Initiative Pass.

effects.description: +1 Free Action per Initiative Pass.

positive.name: Poor Link
positive.summary: -2 Ritual Spellcasting against this character; +2 dice to resist ritual spells.

effects.description: +2 dice to resist ritual spells targeting this character.

positive.name: Privileged Family Name
positive.summary: Minor misdemeanor immunity in home sprawl due to family connections.

positive.name: Restricted Gear
positive.summary: Buy one item up to Availability 24 at character creation.

positive.name: School of Hard Knocks
positive.summary: Half-price Street Knowledge skills at character creation.

positive.name: Sense of Direction
positive.summary: Always knows which way is north; +1 die to Navigation tests.

effects.description: +1 die to Navigation tests.

positive.name: Sensei
positive.summary: Free training contact for one skill.

positive.name: Solid/Legendary Rep
positive.summary: +1/+2 Reputation with a specific group.

positive.name: Speed Reading
positive.summary: Read approximately 800 words per 5 seconds.

positive.name: Spike Resistance
positive.summary: +1 die per level to resist biofeedback damage.

effects.description: +1 die per rating to resist biofeedback damage.

positive.name: Spirit Whisperer
positive.summary: Summoned spirits arrive at Force+1.

effects.description: Summoned spirits of the chosen type arrive at Force + 1.

positive.name: Steely Eyed Wheelman
positive.summary: Terrain modifiers reduced by 1 for vehicle tests.

effects.description: Reduce terrain modifiers by 1 for vehicle tests.

positive.name: Technical School Education
positive.summary: Half-price Professional Knowledge skills at character creation.

positive.name: Tough as Nails
positive.summary: +1 box per rating to Physical or Stun Condition Monitor (max 3 per monitor).

effects.description: +1 box per rating to the chosen Condition Monitor (Physical or Stun).

positive.name: Trust Fund
positive.summary: Free lifestyle and monthly nuyen based on level.

positive.name: Trustworthy
positive.summary: +1 Influence; +2 Social Limit for establishing trust.

effects.description: +1 die to Influence skill group tests.
+2 Social Limit when establishing trust.

positive.name: Vehicle Empathy
positive.summary: +1 Pilot tests; +1 Handling (not jumped in).

effects.description: +1 die to all Vehicle tests.

positive.name: Water Sprite
positive.summary: +2 dice to Diving and Swimming tests.

effects.description: +2 dice to Diving and Swimming tests.

positive.name: Witness My Hate
positive.summary: +2 DV on Direct Damage spells; +2 Drain on those spells.

effects.description: +2 DV to Direct Damage combat spells.
+2 Drain when casting Direct Damage combat spells.

negative.name: Albinism
negative.summary: Increased Glare penalties from lack of pigmentation.

1.name: Partial
1.description: Light skin and hair; increased glare sensitivity.

2.name: Full
2.description: Complete albinism; severe glare penalties and social stigma.

effects.description: Increased glare penalties due to lack of pigmentation.

negative.name: Amnesia
negative.summary: Lost memories; GM controls what is remembered and revealed.

1.name: Partial
1.description: Some memories lost; GM reveals details over time.

2.name: Total
2.description: Complete memory loss; GM controls all backstory reveals.

negative.name: Asthma
negative.summary: Double fatigue frequency; penalties in poor air quality.

effects.description: Fatigue tests occur at double the normal frequency.

negative.name: Bi-polar
negative.summary: Random mood swings affecting attributes; GM rolls each session.

effects.description: GM rolls each session to determine mood state; may gain +1 or -1 to social/mental attributes.

negative.name: Big Regret
negative.summary: -3 Social Limit vs those who know about the regret.

effects.description: -3 Social Limit when dealing with those who know about the regret.

negative.name: Blind
negative.summary: Automatic failure on vision tests; severe combat penalties.

effects.description: Automatic failure on all vision-based Perception tests.
-6 dice to combat-related tests due to blindness.

negative.name: Borrowed Time
negative.summary: Secret death roll each session; terminal condition.

negative.name: Computer Illiterate
negative.summary: -4 dice to all computer and electronics tests.

effects.description: -4 dice to all Computer and Electronics skill tests.

negative.name: Creature of Comfort
negative.summary: Penalties when living below expected lifestyle.

negative.name: Day Job
negative.summary: Income but time commitment reduces availability for runs.

negative.name: Deaf
negative.summary: Automatic failure on audio-based Perception tests.

effects.description: Automatic failure on all hearing-based Perception tests.

negative.name: Did You Just Call Me Dumb?
negative.summary: Social glitches become critical glitches.

negative.name: Dimmer Bulb
negative.summary: -1 per level to Logic or Intuition tests.

effects.description: -1 die per rating to tests using the chosen attribute (Logic or Intuition).

negative.name: Driven
negative.summary: Must pursue obsession; +1 Willpower on leads related to it.

negative.name: Emotional Attachment
negative.summary: Must always use chosen item; penalties when separated.

negative.name: Ex-Con
negative.summary: Police file, criminal SIN, and parole requirements.

negative.name: Flashbacks
negative.summary: Incapacitated on trigger; Composure (5) test to recover.

negative.name: Hobo with a Shotgun
negative.summary: Refuses to stay above Squatter lifestyle.

negative.name: Hung Out to Dry
negative.summary: All contacts have clammed up; cannot use contacts initially.

negative.name: Illiterate
negative.summary: Cannot read; skill restrictions for text-dependent tasks.

negative.name: In Debt
negative.summary: Owe 5,000 nuyen per Karma point; must repay 150%.

negative.name: Incomplete Deprogramming
negative.summary: Cover identity takes over under stress; Composure (4) test.

negative.name: Infirm
negative.summary: Physical attribute maximums reduced by 1 per rating.

effects.description: Reduce Physical attribute maximums (Body, Agility, Reaction, Strength) by 1 per rating.

negative.name: Liar
negative.summary: -1 Social limit; random lying detection by others.

effects.description: -1 Social Limit.

negative.name: Night Blindness
negative.summary: Light modifiers worse by one category.

effects.description: Light/visibility modifiers shift one category worse.

negative.name: Oblivious
negative.summary: -2 Perception; optional +1 to Perception thresholds against you.

2.name: Severe
2.description: -2 Perception and +1 to thresholds against you.

effects.description: -2 dice to all Perception tests.

negative.name: Pacifist
negative.summary: Violence restrictions based on severity.

1.name: Moderate
1.description: Will not kill; non-lethal force only.

2.name: Strict
2.description: Will not use violence at all; must find peaceful solutions.

negative.name: Paranoia
negative.summary: -2 Social with low-Loyalty or unfamiliar contacts.

effects.description: -2 dice to Social tests with low-Loyalty or unfamiliar contacts.

negative.name: Paraplegic
negative.summary: Wheelchair mobility; cannot use legs.

negative.name: Phobia
negative.summary: Irrational fear; variable severity and commonality.

negative.name: Pie Iesu Domine
negative.summary: High Pain Tolerance 1 but start with 1 box of Physical damage.

effects.description: Ignore 1 point of wound modifiers (as High Pain Tolerance 1).
Start each session with 1 box of Physical damage.

negative.name: Poor Self Control
negative.summary: Various compulsions based on type.

negative.name: Records on File
negative.summary: Corps have biometric data; +1 per rating to trace/identify you.

negative.name: Reduced Sense
negative.summary: -2 dice to Perception tests using the specified sense.

effects.description: -2 dice to Perception tests using the specified sense.

negative.name: Sensory Overload Syndrome
negative.summary: Seizures in high-ARO areas; Composure test to avoid incapacitation.

negative.name: Signature
negative.summary: Must leave calling card at every job; makes identification easier.

negative.name: Vendetta
negative.summary: Blood feud; Composure test to avoid confrontation with target.

negative.name: Wanted
negative.summary: 25,000+ nuyen bounty on your head.
